title: Auerodendron cubense
taxonomy: Auerodendron cubense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Auerodendron, which consists of a single species native to Cuba. The plant is a member of the order Myrtales and has been placed within the family Melastomataceae based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic studies. Auerodendron cubense is an endemic species of Cuba, found only in the island's subtropical regions. The classification of Auerodendron cubense is subject to ongoing research and updates in the field of plant taxonomy.
